register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Create your account
register.email_hint: Used for password reset and meet notifications.
register.club_no_clubs: No clubs registered for this org yet. You can create one above.
register.note_placeholder: e.g. I competed at nationals last year
register.spectator_note: All accounts start as Spectator. If you request a role above, your org admin will review and approve it. You'll be able to log in immediately.

register_org.title: Register Organisation
register_org.subtitle: Get your federation on the platform
register_org.note: Your organisation will be reviewed and activated by a platform administrator before you can log in. You'll receive access once approved.

forgot.title: Reset Password
forgot.subtitle: We'll email you a link
forgot.missing_email: Enter the email address on your account
forgot.sent_message: If an account exists for that address, a reset link is on its way. The link expires in 30 minutes.

reset.title: New Password
reset.subtitle: Pick something memorable
reset.missing_token: This page needs to be opened from the link in your reset email.
reset.min_length_error: New password must be at least 6 characters
reset.success: Password updated. Redirecting you to sign in…

confirm_email.title: Confirm Email
confirm_email.subtitle: Verifying your new address
confirm_email.missing_token: This page needs to be opened from the link in your confirmation email.
confirm_email.success: Email updated. Redirecting you to sign in with the new address…

dashboard.label: Coach Dashboard
dashboard.title: My Divers
dashboard.subtitle: For each linked diver: their next dive, current rank, and most-recent completed dive. Ask your org admin to add or remove links from the User Manager.
dashboard.no_divers_body: Once your org admin links you to the divers you coach, their events, results, and analytics will appear here. Ask your federation's admin to open User Manager → your row → Coach Links and add the divers you mentor.
dashboard.up_next_sub: your divers in the next {minutes} minutes
dashboard.alerts_toggle: Notify me when one of my divers is approaching the board
dashboard.alerts_hint: Approximate warning at a 30s shot-clock: 1 dive ≈ 30s, 2 dives ≈ 1 min, 3 dives ≈ 90s. Alerts fan out across every Live event you have a squad member in.

dive_lists.no_divers_body: You don't have any divers linked yet. Ask your org admin to add coach links in the User Manager.
dive_lists.withdraw_tooltip: Scratch this diver from the event
dive_lists.withdraw_prompt:
Withdraw {name} from {event}?

Optionally enter a reason (visible in the audit log + Control Room):
dive_lists.withdraw_confirm_body: This marks every round in this event as withdrawn for {name}. The operator will see it in the Control Room and the spectator scoreboard will reflect the change. Reinstating requires the meet manager.

hero.tagline: End-to-end diving competition management — from event setup and dive list submission through to live judging, broadcast scores, and final results.
hero.guide_link: New here? Read the 5-minute user guide →

live_strip.text: Live scoreboard is open to everyone — no login required

features.section_label: Built for every role in the pool
features.diver_portal_desc: Submit your dive list ahead of competition. DD requirements are validated automatically against the official directory.
features.control_room_desc: Advance through the dive order, monitor incoming judge scores in real time, and issue referee rulings without leaving the screen.
features.judge_terminal_desc: Touch-optimised scoring interface. Tap a score and submit — synced instantly to the control room and scoreboard.
features.scoreboard_desc: One browsable surface for every meet — broadcast-ready live view of the current diver and standings, plus full recaps and dive breakdowns for completed meets.
features.meet_manager_desc: Create events, configure rounds and panel sizes, assign judges, and manage the full structure of a competition.
features.user_manager_desc: Approve role requests and control member access across your federation. Every role change is gated through a request workflow.

how.step01_desc: The meet manager creates events, sets the number of rounds and judges, and assigns the panel.
how.step02_desc: Each diver logs in and submits their dive list. DD values are pulled from the official directory automatically.
how.step03_desc: The referee steps through the dive order on the control room screen. Judges score on their own devices in real time.
how.step04_desc: Scores appear on the live scoreboard the moment they're confirmed. Standings update after every dive.

diver_profile.click_meet_for_details: Click a meet for the full result + per-round breakdown.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.empty_body: Nothing waiting for you right now.

compare.title: Compare divers
compare.subtitle: Pick two divers to see them head-to-head
compare.no_overlap: These two divers have no overlapping meets.

dive_directory.subtitle: Official catalog with DDs by board height

judge.panel_offline: Panel offline — your scores will sync when reconnected.

manager.empty_state_body: Create your first meet to get started.

user_manager.subtitle: Approve role requests and manage member access
